content: I think you should be set on moonless for now. Ghelot is about to rerun in the next set of reruns. If you want to pick her up then that banner would be a better time than gambling on moonless. Otherwise you already got horla and thais so you kind of won moonless anyway <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>.

Standards banners are kind of up to you. After buffs I think they are all roughly equal strength with chaos being a little weaker overall. You want to pull standards banners either to compliment your limiteds or just initially to fill out 5 teams for dtide as you get into the midgame progression.
Ok, thank you
I'll decide later then, so far I'm just enjoying the story, thanks again
I just finished chap 1 arc 2
my team is mouchette saya thais ryker
I just need better units for dtide
guys i just started playing, is hameln good?
Stupid question
Use a different one
He’s good when Filling his niche, but Clem and Murphy have more general use

He is kind of ok overall. He really only feels like the best in slot support for tawil which is more of a whale team these days. He is playable in other places but doesn't feel especially strong or the best option.
At least to me <:Jenkin_idk:1356084138280489080>
I’d pull Clem Murphy and then *Maybe* Hameln but we’re getting 3 good dps units next rerun as well, So there’s that to consider as well
oh okkk
and which characters do yall recommend me to choose on moonless guide?
Thais horla + 2

This item is called **Origin Of Time**, which provides two main benefits:

**Full Refund**: Recovers all XP and materials you invested in the character you use it on.

**Duplicate Conversion**: Only for Standard Awakeners (not for Limited in the Standard pool or the starting SR Awakeners), converts
